name: Phenyl salicylate
description: Phenyl salicylate is a 2-hydroxybenzoic acid phenyl ester. It is used in some manufacturing processes of polymers, lacquers, adhesives, waxes, and polishes. It is an active ingredient in some pharmaceutical products as a mild analgesic for pain relief by releasing salicylate. Phenyl salicylate can also be found in some antiseptic agents.
